title: Topsoe Fuels Chinaâ€™s Push for Sustainable Aviation Fuel with Major New Technology Partnership
content: Topsoe has signed an agreement with Tangshan Jinlihai to deliver the Hydroflex technology and services that will enable production of sustainable aviation fuel at the Caofeidian Petrochemical Industry Base, set to break ground in the second half of 2026 with start-up targeted for the second half of 2028, marking a crucial step forward in high-end green energy and new quality productivity.  Selected as technology provider for Tangshan Jinlihai industrial hub with a capacity of 300,000 tons of feedstock annually, Topsoeâ€™s technology is expected to enable an annual emission avoidance of approximately 700,000 metric tons of CO2e, equivalent to avoiding emissions from around two million passengers flying from Beijing to Copenhagen, supporting efforts to reduce emissions across China and Europe and advancing sustainable aviation fuel and renewable diesel.  The project will fully leverage the geographical and industrial advantages of the Caofeidian National Petrochemical Base, using waste oil as feedstock to build high-quality SAF production in alignment with Chinaâ€™s dual carbon strategy and growing global SAF demand projected by IATA.
author: Analysts Account
